title: New Evangelion iPhone iPod Touch apps
display_title: New Evangelion iPhone iPod Touch apps
wikitext:
[]: New Evangelion iPhone/iPod Touch apps             Quote Post by ZapX » Wed Feb 18, 2009 9:29 am http://www.evageeks.org/2009/02/evangelion-apps-coming-to-iphoneipod-touch/ Dunno how many of you use iPod Touch or iPhone but if you do Eva apps are on the way.

[]:             Quote Post by BrikHaus » Wed Feb 18, 2009 9:58 am The most disturbing thing about this is that Zap gets to post blog updates to the main page.

[]:             Quote Post by EvaCub » Wed Feb 18, 2009 12:43 pm soo will we get them in th3 US?

[]:             Quote Post by ZapX » Wed Feb 18, 2009 12:48 pm They haven't said that specifically, but they do mention international anime fans outside of Japan a lot so I'd guess so.

[]:             Quote Post by Dartz » Wed Feb 18, 2009 3:18 pm Ewwww..... iPhone. uSheep

[]:             Quote Post by Typhon » Wed Feb 18, 2009 8:42 pm 3 words: Asuka......choking......app........ yes..........oh, oh, oh, yes....

[]:             Quote Post by Holy Diver » Wed Feb 18, 2009 8:47 pm Typhon wrote: 3 words: Asuka......choking......app........ yes..........oh, oh, oh, yes....

[]:             Quote Post by IrkenEvangelion » Wed Feb 18, 2009 10:21 pm WOOOOOOOOOOT!!!! I will buy everyone they come out with. I use my iPod touch constantly and hope to get an iPhone soon. Whoever doesn't like iPods or Apple products should be burned at the stake...

[]:             Quote Post by Typhon » Wed Feb 18, 2009 10:28 pm if u r a true eva fan, demand a choking Asuka iphone app. just think of all the great justice it will entail! so much justice...masochistic......perverse.....obsesive......creepy......justice.....

[]:             Quote Post by Grand Duke of Yashima » Fri Feb 20, 2009 1:03 am Damn! I was holding out for the Palm Pre and now they do this with the iPhone. I suppose I'll have to see it the apps are actually cool enough to justify getting an iPhone now. Does this mean that you would be able to get "Beautiful World" as your ring tone, too?

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Fri Feb 20, 2009 2:12 am Grand Duke of Yashima wrote: able to get "Beautiful World" as your ring tone, too?

[]:             Quote Post by ZapX » Tue Feb 24, 2009 12:50 pm http://appliya-inc.com/en/catalog/evangelion_clock/ http://appliya-inc.com/en/catalog/evangelion_stamp/

[]:             Quote Post by Otakon 08 Ikari » Tue Feb 24, 2009 2:35 pm Alright those are really sweet but I do not own an IPhone. Do you think someone could mod it so you can use this on say another phone with a large screen or on your computer?

[]:             Quote Post by ZapX » Tue Feb 24, 2009 2:50 pm No. You lose. Besides, there are already Eva clocks for your computer.

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Tue Feb 24, 2009 3:13 pm Forget the apps; those tarot cards look awesome .

[]:             Quote Post by Otakon 08 Ikari » Tue Feb 24, 2009 8:59 pm We downloaded both of them We keep putting Rei's hair on stuff and ATF's around things..It looks pretty cool. The countdown is pretty cool, does a cool shutdown noise when it runs out of energy.

[]:             Quote Post by IrkenEvangelion » Tue Feb 24, 2009 10:57 pm But of course the prices are 1.99 and 2.99. Heaven forbid the make it 0.99 or... *gasp!* free. EDIT: Speaking of free. Did you pay for them? On the website they're posting codes to get them for free, I just got both of them for free. Yay.

[]:             Quote Post by Guyver Spawn » Wed Feb 25, 2009 8:14 am I have already have a iPod Touch (I share with my 16 year old sister though) and I doubt I will get one soon. If their on Ebay then I will get one the sooner I can.

[]:             Quote Post by ZapX » Mon Mar 02, 2009 6:22 pm Cut-outs this time. http://appliya-inc.com/en/catalog/Evangelion_cutout/

[]:             Quote Post by IrkenEvangelion » Mon Mar 02, 2009 11:05 pm Just saw it today in the app store. I haven't seen any promo codes so I'm gonna wait to see if I can find one.
